channel.title: publication on Ziniu Li
channel.description: Recent content in publication on Ziniu Li

item.title: Publication
item.description: My publication profile at Google Scholar. * indicates the equal contribution. [2021] Tian Xu, Ziniu Li*, Yang Yu. Nearly Minimax Optimal Adversarial Imitation Learning with Known and Unknown Transitions. arXiv:2106.10424. [paper] [2020] Tian Xu, Ziniu Li, Yang Yu. Error Bounds of Imitating Policies and Environments. In Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 33 (NeurIPS), 2020. [paper] [poster] [code] [blog] Ziniu Li*, Xiong-Hui Chen*. Efficient Exploration by Novelty-pursuit.
